input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: each team may attempt the endurance event once.

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.1.2: Each team may attempt the Endurance event once.
D.12.1.2 Each team may attempt the Endurance event once.

final_answer: Each team may attempt the Endurance event once.
